metadata.lyrics:
[00:22.63] Callin' out your name
[00:25.29] 
[00:29.29] Callin' out your name
[00:33.69] Can you hear me callin' out your name?
[00:37.80] You know that I'm fallin' and I don't know what to say
[00:42.16] I'll speak a little louder, I'll even shout
[00:46.16] You know that I'm proud and I can't get the words out
[00:50.03] (Ohh), (I), (I-I, I-I, I-I)
[00:55.04] I wanna be with you everywhere
[00:56.74] (Ohh), (I), (I-I, I-I, I-I)
[01:03.42] I wanna be with you everywhere
[01:05.77] (Wanna be with you everywhere)
[01:13.05] 
[01:15.68] Somethin's happenin', happenin' to me
[01:19.60] My friends say, I'm actin' peculiarly
[01:24.04] Come along, baby, we better make a start
[01:28.20] You better make it soon, before you break my heart
[01:33.51] 
[01:36.27] (Ohh), (I), (I-I, I-I, I-I)
[01:36.96] I wanna be with you everywhere
[01:38.77] (Ohh), (I), (I-I, I-I, I-I)

[01:47.73] (Wanna be with you everywhere)
[01:58.77]

[02:23.13] (Ohh), (I), (I-I, I-I, I-I)
